errors.ACCOUNT_INACTIVE: This account is inactive. Contact your administrator.
errors.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Account temporarily locked after too many failed attempts.
errors.DEVICE_NOT_AUTHORIZED: PG accounts must sign in via the mobile app.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again later.
errors.PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to access this.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
